scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sips:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sips:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sips:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sips:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=251511 1313510207 2738 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XTE240 c=IN IP4 10.133.39.159 b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 3246 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv m=application 45084 TCP/UDP/BFCP * a=floorctrl:c-s a=confid:1 a=userid:1 a=floorid:2 mstrm:12 a=setup:actpass a=connection:new

ACK sips:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE sips:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
